priorities.reason: Progress color carries the primary Goal / Progress meaning and needs source-backed state separation before any token extraction.
priorities.sourceEvidenceNeeded: Confirm which source visual roles distinguish pending, low, completed, overachieved, empty, and unavailable progress without extracting raw values yet.
priorities.nextReviewQuestion: Which progress state colors are meaning-bearing source evidence versus local runtime styling?

priorities.reason: Metric color supports compact current-value hierarchy, but it is secondary to progress, trend, reward, and unavailable-state meaning.
priorities.sourceEvidenceNeeded: Confirm source visual hierarchy for metric label, value, caption, error, completed, and overachieved roles.
priorities.nextReviewQuestion: Which metric color roles are stable across activity stats and optional modules?

priorities.reason: Trend direction and data confidence need source-backed meaning before trend tokens can be trusted.
priorities.sourceEvidenceNeeded: Confirm source treatment for trend direction, trend education, insufficient data, and action emphasis.
priorities.nextReviewQuestion: Does source evidence distinguish improving, declining, neutral, and insufficient trend states visually?

priorities.reason: Reward status must remain achievement evidence rather than decorative color, so source-backed status roles need review.
priorities.sourceEvidenceNeeded: Confirm source treatment for locked, unlocked, new, in-progress, and default reward evidence.
priorities.nextReviewQuestion: Which reward colors communicate status, and which are decorative source-specific polish?

priorities.reason: Surface roles shape the dashboard reading order, but raw surface values should wait until meaning-bearing state colors are prioritized.
priorities.sourceEvidenceNeeded: Confirm source hierarchy between canvas, panel, card, optional module, and missing-state surfaces.
priorities.nextReviewQuestion: Which surface roles are transferable pattern structure rather than source-specific dark styling?

priorities.reason: Metric typography carries scan priority for the required SummaryDashboard core.
priorities.sourceEvidenceNeeded: Confirm source hierarchy for metric value, unit, label, and caption without copying raw font values.
priorities.nextReviewQuestion: Which metric typography roles are essential for compact scanning and localization pressure?

priorities.reason: Record typography separates completed behavior evidence from generic metric display.
priorities.sourceEvidenceNeeded: Confirm source hierarchy for workout title, duration, date, labels, and unavailable metadata.
priorities.nextReviewQuestion: Which record typography roles preserve completed-record semantics?

priorities.reason: Trend typography supports interpretation, but source text model remains less confirmed than metric and record hierarchy.
priorities.sourceEvidenceNeeded: Confirm source hierarchy for trend subject, direction label, explanation, and action text.
priorities.nextReviewQuestion: Which trend typography roles are source-backed versus synthetic runtime scaffolding?

priorities.reason: Reward typography supports status readability, but exact award content and source states remain unreviewed.
priorities.sourceEvidenceNeeded: Confirm source hierarchy for award title, status, description, and progress evidence.
priorities.nextReviewQuestion: Which reward typography roles prevent AwardBadge from becoming decoration-only?

priorities.reason: SummaryDashboard density and module order depend on source-backed summary spacing before promotion can be considered.
priorities.sourceEvidenceNeeded: Confirm source spacing relationships between header, activity core, optional modules, and missing states.
priorities.nextReviewQuestion: Which spacing roles preserve summary scanning without turning the surface into a source clone?

priorities.reason: Component interior spacing matters, but pattern-level SummaryDashboard spacing should be reviewed first.
priorities.sourceEvidenceNeeded: Confirm source evidence for component padding, internal gaps, inline gaps, and compact stacks.
priorities.nextReviewQuestion: Which component spacing roles transfer across metric, record, trend, and reward surfaces?

priorities.reason: Dashboard density determines whether the concept loop can remain scannable when optional modules are present.
priorities.sourceEvidenceNeeded: Confirm source evidence for compact versus composed dashboard density and optional module preview density.
priorities.nextReviewQuestion: Can source-backed density support Goal -> Behavior -> Record -> Trend -> Reward without full app-shell scope?

priorities.reason: Radius is visible in runtime CSS, but project policy says it should not be inherited automatically from source styling.
priorities.sourceEvidenceNeeded: Defer source radius review until color, typography, spacing, density, and state treatment are reviewed.
priorities.nextReviewQuestion: Should radius become a transferable policy or remain implementation-local after source evidence review?

priorities.reason: Unavailable and missing states affect accessibility, semantic truthfulness, and product trust across the loop.
priorities.sourceEvidenceNeeded: Confirm source treatment for unavailable progress, missing metadata, insufficient trend data, and empty reward data.
priorities.nextReviewQuestion: How does the source distinguish unavailable, insufficient, empty, and missing without implying failure?

priorities.reason: Interactive affordance needs accessibility review, but most current interactive states are synthetic runtime targets.
priorities.sourceEvidenceNeeded: Confirm source evidence for action emphasis, focus treatment, and target affordance after state semantics are stable.
priorities.nextReviewQuestion: Which interactive roles are source-backed and which are web adaptation behavior?

notes: This matrix plans source-backed visual evidence review only. It does not read Figma, extract raw values, connect tokens to CSS, or promote tokens.
